Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1036 0 0}I doubt the key would be in the library. Let's check the faculty office.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1003 0 0}We don't need anything in there. C'mon, let's meet up with everyone.[n]{f 1 1}
